descriptionHtml:
Falcon 86 For Sale 2006 | 4 Guest Cabins + 2 Crew Cabins | Tax Not Paid

If you’re considering a spacious and capable motor yacht, the Falcon 86 For Sale 2006 is a model worth exploring. Built in 2006, she is in good condition and well-suited for comfortable cruising, family gatherings, or entertaining groups of friends aboard. Featuring a practical design and robust engineering, this yacht balances functionality with an inviting atmosphere.

Specifications:

  • Boat Type: Motor Yacht
  • Year Built: 2006
  • Condition: Good
  • Cabins: 2 double, 2 twin, 2 crew
  • Heads: 4
  • Length Overall (LOA): 22.20 m
  • Beam: 5.5 m
  • Draft: 2.2 m
  • Fuel Tank: 8,400 L
  • Water Tank: 1,500 L
  • Engines: MTU 16V, 2 x 2,000hp (Diesel), 2,800 hrs
  • Generator: ONAN MDKBF-5707887 (right: 20,000 hrs, left: 1,800 hrs)
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Heating: Yes
  • Galley Equipment: Microwave oven, dishwasher, washing machine, icemaker, BBQ
  • Watermaker: Yes
  • Teak Cockpit: Yes
  • Hydraulic Gangway: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes
  • GPS: Yes
  • TV Set: Yes
  • Cockpit Speakers: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Dinghy & Outboard: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes

The Falcon 86 For Sale 2006 offers a balance of practicality and comfort, making her a solid choice for those seeking a reliable motor yacht with a proven layout and equipment. She is available for inspection and ready for her next adventure.
